title: Rose Gold Gear
description: Adds Rose Gold equipment as an upgrade for Iron equipment, the same way as Netherite to Diamonds.
body:
# Rose Gold Mod

Rose Gold is a lightweight mod that introduces Rose Gold Alloy, a new material crafted by combining gold and copper.

## Features

Rose Gold Alloy: craftable with copper and gold.

Rose Gold Smithing Template: found in structers.

Tools & Weapons: durable like iron, but with golden efficiency.

Armor: step-up from iron with small knockback resistance.

Naturally Balanced: sits right between iron and diamond, perfect for mid-game progression.

## Why Rose Gold?

Because sometimes gold is too soft, iron has been aquired for a long time, and diamond is too late-game. Rose Gold gives you that perfect balance between iron and diamond.

## Credits

Idea inspiration: [rhm176](https://modrinth.com/user/N2BSWRPV)

Assets: taken from [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/project/R4TvILfj)
